summary: Validate TTS output when user hovers over HDR toggle
description:
GIVEN a device is HDR capable
AND TTS is enabled
AND the user is on the settings page

steps.action: WHEN the user hovers over the HDR toggle
steps.result:
THEN the user should hear:

HDR Toggle, Toggle is set to <On/Off>, Toggle on to receive the highest resolution streams, including HDR (where available), from Major League Baseball. If you experience buffering issues, try toggling to off. Press select to <Off/On>.
